domains.name: Designing and planning a cloud solution architecture
Managing and provisioning a solution infrastructure
Analyzing and optimizing technology and business processes

questions.text: You are preparing for Google Professional Cloud Architect and reviewing Designing and planning a cloud solution architecture. Which source aligns with official Google Cloud documentation and exam guides?
questions.explanation: Use PCA exam guide and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.text: You are preparing for Google Professional Cloud Architect and reviewing Managing and provisioning a solution infrastructure. Which source aligns with official Google Cloud documentation and exam guides?
questions.explanation: Use Terraform on Google Cloud and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.text: You are preparing for Google Professional Cloud Architect and reviewing Designing for security and compliance. Which source aligns with official Google Cloud documentation and exam guides?
questions.explanation: Use Security foundations and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.text: You are preparing for Google Professional Cloud Architect and reviewing Analyzing and optimizing technology and business processes. Which source aligns with official Google Cloud documentation and exam guides?
questions.explanation: Use Reliability pillar and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.text: You are preparing for Google Professional Cloud Architect and reviewing Managing implementation. Which source aligns with official Google Cloud documentation and exam guides?
questions.explanation: Use Deployment Manager and other official materials listed in the exam guide—not copied exam items.

questions.text: After a design review, leadership requires the team to design reliable systems on GCP. Which approach is MOST reliable?

questions.explanation: Hybrid links connect on-prem to GCP.

questions.text: Two designs were proposed. Design A would infrastructure as code on GCP. Design B would preview infrastructure changes. The team must pick the approach aligned with vendor best practices. Which choice is correct?

options.text: Terraform plan or Deployment Manager previews

questions.explanation: IaC enables repeatable environments. Compare with Terraform plan or Deployment Manager previews: Previews reduce deployment surprises.

questions.text: For cost and security, the team must encrypt data with customer-managed keys. What is the recommended approach?

Which Google Cloud service should you use to encrypt data with customer-managed keys?
What is the recommended Google Cloud solution to encrypt data with customer-managed keys?

Which Google Cloud service should you use to centralize org security findings?
What is the recommended Google Cloud solution to centralize org security findings?
A platform team must centralize org security findings. Which option aligns with Google best practices?
A data team must encrypt data with customer-managed keys.
For cost-aware operations, you should centralize org security findings.
A cloud engineer needs to encrypt data with customer-managed keys.
Your startup is building on Google Cloud and needs to centralize org security findings.

Two designs were proposed. Design A would encrypt data with customer-managed keys. Design B would centralize org security findings. The team must pick the approach aligned with vendor best practices. Which choice is correct?
questions.explanation: KMS manages encryption keys. Compare with Security Command Center: SCC aggregates risk across projects.

questions.text: Two designs were proposed. Design A would centralize org security findings. Design B would encrypt data with customer-managed keys. The team must pick the approach aligned with vendor best practices. Which choice is correct?
questions.explanation: SCC aggregates risk across projects. Compare with Cloud KMS: KMS manages encryption keys.
